'''Cevva Xuz''' was a [[Rodian/Legends|Rodian]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] living in the [[City/Legends|city]] of [[Wrils]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Svivren]] as of [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]]. [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] authorities suspected him of ties to the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebellion]].

==Appearances==
*[[Mara Jade – By the Emperor's Hand 1|''Mara Jade – By the Emperor's Hand'' 1]] {{1st}} {{Hologram}}
